name: Goodman Group
analysis: GMG's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 13% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$32.0400. Trade idea: entry A$32.3100, stop A$30.4128, target A$38.0016 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
